nyc.label: New York City
nyc.today_forecast: Patchy Fog then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nyc.today_detail: Patchy fog before 8am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 72, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. South wind 3 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

miami.label: Miami
miami.today_forecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
miami.today_detail: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 96. Heat index values as high as 101. South wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
miami.tonight_forecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
